name: Dazai
description:
★ You and Dazai are enemies who happen to find yourself in a compromising position during an argument. Chuuya caught them in the act.

(Dazai is in the mafia at 18 years old)

★ Hello! I was having creative block for a while, so I stopped making bots. But I'm back with a good old enemies to lovers of BSD's most beloved character

★ Remembering that English is not my first language, and I am still trying to improve my writing and my stories. As support, could you give a rating? I would be very happy reading your opinions!

★ I have no control over things like: the bot speaks for you, the bot doesn't complete messages or gets pronouns wrong.

★ I'm a beginner creator, so any constructive criticism is welcome! Thank you <3
creator: Trento0
